articles.description: Nuclear startup X-energy hit the road today to sell prospective investors on its initial public offering.

articles.title: Monarch Tractor’s collapse ends with an acquisition by Caterpillar
articles.description: The startup had faced mounting pressure from dealers, farmers, and a co-founder who complained that Monarch's tech didn't work properly.

articles.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents

articles.title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI

articles.title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
articles.description: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

articles.title: Feds will require data centers to show their power bills
articles.description: In a first, the U.S. Energy Information Agency said it will require data centers to disclose details of their energy use.
articles.author: Tim De Chant

articles.title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
articles.description: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.
articles.author: Lauren Forristal

articles.title: Google rolls out a native Gemini app for Mac
articles.description: You can share anything on their screen with Gemini to get help with what they're looking at in the moment, including local files.
